candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly R&D-related amortisation above operating profit. Since no separate R&D expense row is visible and XRD final_choice is empty, this is the clearest operating D&A row that can be added to XSGA_DA under the special R&D rule.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Employee benefit expenses', 'Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses', and 'Other Operating Expenses'. Generic 'Depreciation'/'Amortisation' rows are visible but not clearly attributable to XSGA versus other operating buckets, so they are excluded conservatively. However, 'Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses' is an explicit operating R&D D&A row, no separate above-EBIT R&D expense row is present, and XRD is empty, so this row should be added separately to XSGA_DA per the special R&D interaction rule.
